description: User can add a product to the cart from the product detail page and see the cart count update immediately.
kane_one_liner: Add to cart updates counter instantly
kane_summary: Cart count updates on product add

description: User can open the cart dropdown and see all added items with their names and prices.
kane_one_liner: Cart dropdown shows item names and prices
kane_steps: Assert items listed with names and prices

description: User can remove an item from the cart and the cart total updates correctly.
User can search for a product by name and see relevant results on the search results page.
kane_steps: Type product name in search bar

description: User can browse the product catalog and see product tiles with names and prices.
kane_one_liner: Catalog displays product tiles with pricing
kane_steps: Assert product tiles with names and prices visible

description: User can click a product tile to open the product detail page showing name, image, and price.
kane_one_liner: Product tile opens detail page with name, image, price
kane_steps: Assert detail page shows name, image, price

description: User can apply a category filter to narrow down the displayed products.
